character.name: Female mage, short blonde hair,
character.prompt:
Female mage, short blonde hair, slim light build. Sleeveless blue-gray
tunic, short skirt, brown leather boots. Holding a neutral glowing
energy orb in raised hand — orb base color warm neutral (element
applied at runtime: fire, frost, light). Tunic has weathered wear
marks and fabric cracks. No fixed element color locked in anchor.
Dark fantasy pixel art, Diablo 2 / Hades style, heavy black outline,
muted cool palette, transparent background.
